parents.subject: LU-13437 llite: pack parent FID in getattr

commit.subject: LU-13892 lnet: lock-up during router check
commit.message:
LU-13892 lnet: lock-up during router check

This is a test patch for the issue with LNet lock-up
while waiting for routers to become active with
check_routers_before_use option.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity,sanityn,conf-sanity,lnet-selftest,sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib7ce4aef9744a91c4800d1e282d88fb23ab55746
